message:
fix(tests): align ext4 MMP message check + add fuzz seed corpus

1. conformance.rs: update ext4_active_mmp_write_open_is_rejected to
   match the current error message wording ("instead of participating
   in periodic MMP heartbeat updates" vs old "write-participating MMP
   is not implemented").

2. fuzz/corpus/fuzz_fuse_splice_mount: add minimal_seed so
   fuzz_seed_corpus_covers_all_targets passes. The directory was
   created but left empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
